item.description: The Barstewards Enquiry reposteó Jess Keys - The Producer @TheProducer24 · 21min En respuesta a @AntepostValue y @BarstewardsThe You clearly haven’t read this and the shit myself and Lee have been put through this last year for trying to help the sport out. Cita The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 21 feb. Artículo The Unlikely Alliance - A story of betrayal and the reemergence of a stalker. After 14 months of holding my tongue, while many people whom I used to regard as friends put out half-truths and lies. I have decided to release the full story of how I came to work with Matt Zarb... 1 5 778

item.title: BarstewardsThe: The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 29min That's why on Thursday I am meeting in person in York someone suffering
item.description:
The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 29min That's why on Thursday I am meeting in person in York someone suffering with mental health issues. Don't chuck that at me, you don't know me and anything I do for people suffering with mental health. Cita Liam Firkin @AntepostValue · 40min En respuesta a @BarstewardsThe I know. Imagine coming from outside the sport with no leg up, trying hard at something, taking a huge pay cut from your day-to-day job to pursue a career in something you enjoy while making other people money
I really am the devil
The mental health advocate who spews hate 1 1 6 1 mil

The Barstewards Enquiry reposteó Jess Keys - The Producer @TheProducer24 · 35min En respuesta a @AntepostValue y @BarstewardsThe What have you done for the sport in the last few years to fight against these checks? Lee has though outside the box, worked for free and got dogs abuse for talking to people who are now helping sort this mess out. Whilst those that work in the industry just ignored the issue. 1 8 706

item.title: BarstewardsThe: The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 39min Unhinged Cita Liam Firkin @AntepostValue · 40min En respuesta a @Barstew
item.description:
The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 39min Unhinged Cita Liam Firkin @AntepostValue · 40min En respuesta a @BarstewardsThe I know. Imagine coming from outside the sport with no leg up, trying hard at something, taking a huge pay cut from your day-to-day job to pursue a career in something you enjoy while making other people money
I really am the devil
The mental health advocate who spews hate 5 829

item.title: BarstewardsThe: The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 51min Given the fact no one was interested 4 years ago (scared of losing their
item.description:
The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 51min Given the fact no one was interested 4 years ago (scared of losing their jobs) and I have worked with people on the front line to sort this and you chime up with this. Keep grifting like you do! Cita Liam Firkin @AntepostValue · 54min I assume the banging of this drum was precisely TO GET OTHERS to take notice and join the conversation against these checks?
Now annoyed that people are
Seemingly more important to be the bastion of flying the “moral” flag than actually wanting to effect change x.com/barstewardsthe… 2 13 2 mil

item.title: BarstewardsThe: The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 50min En respuesta a @BarstewardsThe A f*cking tipstar winner you can't make
item.description: The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 50min En respuesta a @BarstewardsThe A f*cking tipstar winner you can't make this tweet up. 1 7 811

item.title: RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 50min In tomorrow's Racing Post 2 2 2 2 mil
